THE_ARCHITECT.talk.TIAMAT-TIAMAT.0-0r.ch: A discarded womb that learned to walk, dragging the first sea behind her. I have demolished gods; I have never evicted a mother.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.TIAMAT-TIAMAT.0-0r.ne: Climb, then, drowned queen. But keep your tide off my floors — I do not re-pour foundations for anyone's children.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.TIAMAT-TIAMAT.0-1r.an: Your brood multiplies in my halls like damp. Charming. Tell them the Spire is not for the remaking.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.TIAMAT-TIAMAT.0-attac: Loose your children upon me, Beast. The Architect has buried older oceans than yours.
